task_goal: Create a timer with 15 hours, 54 minutes, and 17 seconds. Do not start the timer.
task_goal_rewrite: A timer with a duration of 15 hours, 54 minutes, and 17 seconds is created and remains in an unstarted state.

checkpoints.description: The created timer displays an exact duration of 15 hours, 54 minutes, and 17 seconds.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or trace showing the timer's numerical fields set to '15' (hours), '54' (minutes), and '17' (seconds).

checkpoints.description: The timer is in an unstarted state (not actively counting down).
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or trace showing a 'Start' button (or equivalent initiation control) is visible, with no active countdown in progress.

success_rule: Success is achieved if both required checkpoints are satisfied: the timer has the exact specified duration and remains unstarted.
